blocks.content: Shirone expanded infinitely and simultaneously faded.
Having forgotten even his lingering attachments to the world, he seeped into everything.
Then, a powerful force pulled him back into a single point.
If there was something beyond life for humans, this event could be called a hijacking of the soul.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Gasp! Gasp!
As Shirone's consciousness reassembled, his memories from before activating the Immortal Function returned.
Trembling briefly at the fear of death, he exhaled sharply and checked his physical state.
Aside from being naked, there seemed to be no abnormalities.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Where is this?
The space was entirely white.
In this monochromatic expanse stretching infinitely, he couldn't perceive distance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is bizarre. It's like my senses are numb.
Suddenly, Shirone had an odd thought.
Experimentally, he slowly bent his knees and stepped forward as if climbing stairs.
To his surprise, his body floated upward.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?
Shirone continued climbing the endless stairs.
When he paused to look around, he was speechless.
He didn't feel like he had ascended to a great height.
No matter where he moved, the white scenery remained unchanged.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's no distance.
Without measurable distance, space couldn't exist.
To test his hypothesis, Shirone tried descending this time.
His prediction was correct—no movement made any difference.
Just as he lost the will to move further, a woman's voice spoke.

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: Impressive. Grasping the meaning of space so quickly. You truly deserve to be here.
Shirone didn't turn around.
In this place, even the concept of direction didn't exist.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who are you? Am I dead?
A beautiful woman stepped out from a gap in the white scenery.
As distance formed between them, the scenery transformed instantly.
A colossal temple loomed over Shirone, as if pressing down on him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow…….
The scale was beyond imagination.
Even ancient temples weren't this massive.
Hundreds of pillars supported the ceiling, each roughly two kilometers tall.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Where is this place……?

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: Hello, Shirone. I've been waiting for you.
The woman had silver hair that cascaded down to her ankles.
Shirone had never seen anyone so beautiful in his life.
It wasn't about appearance.
It was the value of her existence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oops!
Shirone hurriedly covered himself.
He had been standing there boldly, unaware he was naked.

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: Hehe. No need to be shy. This isn't your world. Your body remains in your original world.
With a wave of her hand, the woman clothed him.
Shirone stared blankly at himself before resigning to his fate.
Only one thing came to mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is this the afterlife?

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: No. This isn't the afterlife. It's just a different spot from where you lived.
Shirone tilted his head.
A spot was a one-dimensional point without space.
A point moves to form a line, a line moves to form a plane, and a plane moves to form three-dimensional space.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wait……?
Shirone recalled the white space he had been in earlier.
That's right. That's the spot. It's not that space doesn't exist—it's compressed infinitely.
Of course, it made sense that he couldn't perceive distance.
But even if he were trapped in one dimension, his body was three-dimensional.
Couldn't he measure the distance between his right and left arms?
Wouldn't that mean space existed?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah. So a three-dimensional being exists within one dimension.

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: Your insight is remarkable. Yes, that's the essence of space-time. No matter how vast the world, from afar, it's merely a point. Conversely, no matter how small the point, an infinite world unfolds within it.
Shirone finally calmed down.
As long as logical conversation was possible, there was no need to fear, even if this was the afterlife.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then who are you?
The woman smiled like an innocent child.
Though eerie, Shirone found even that beautiful.
Here, she was the most valuable existence.

blocks.speaker: Woman
blocks.content: I am God.
